MODULE: cosmos.trading.degen_trader
FILE: cosmos/trading/degen_trader.py (7883 lines)
CATEGORY: trading

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Degen Trader v4.1 - Whale Hunter + Tightened Loss Prevention

High-frequency Solana memecoin trader powered by the Cosmos swarm.
- DIRECT Pump.fun bonding curve buys (no Jupiter needed pre-graduation)
- PumpPortal local transaction API for speed-critical buys
- Pre-bonding curve sniping: buy 

CLASSES:
- _CosmosAuthLock: Validates this trader is running inside the Cosmos ecosystem.

- TrackedWallet: A profitable wallet we're copy trading.
- TradeMemoryEntry: A single trade's learning data stored in memory.
- TraderConfig
